description_long: This object consists of a rectangular cardboard box and a transparent cylindrical syringe. The box is labeled 'Zoladex 3.6mg' and features both English and Arabic text, with a color scheme of yellow, orange, and purple. The syringe is clear, revealing an internal plunger mechanism and a brownish stopper at one end, with the brand name 'Zoladex' printed along its side. The box appears to be the primary packaging, while the syringe is the medicine delivery device, likely pre-filled for injection. The overall appearance is clean and professional, with pharmaceutical branding and dosage information clearly displayed. The materials suggest a combination of cardboard for the box and plastic with some metal or rubber components for the syringe.
description: A Zoladex 3.6mg medicine package with a labeled cardboard box and a transparent pre-filled syringe, featuring visible branding and dosage information.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Zoladex box with English labeling and the full syringe with visible internal plunger.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the length of the syringe and the top face of the box with the Zoladex label.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the box with Arabic labeling and the side of the syringe.
description_view_3: Side view showing the narrow edge of the box and the circular end of the syringe.
attribute_label_text: Zoladex 3.6mg goserelin Solution for injection in pre-filled syringe with a protective sleeve. Subcutaneous injection. Prescription only medicine. AstraZeneca
attribute_brand_logo: green and white rectangular emblem with AstraZeneca logo in purple and yellow
